title: DBDA studio
shortDesc: Website of a Prague-based architectural studio.
longDesc: A professional platform for a Prague-based architectural studio. The site presents modern architectural designs that harmonize with landscape and history, requiring a structured yet elegant presentation of large-scale projects.
challenge: Maintaining high performance while displaying high-resolution architectural project galleries.
solution: Developed a custom image optimization pipeline and a clean, project-focused navigation system.

title: Jenko Studio
longDesc: A minimalist digital portfolio for artist. Designed with a clean, immersive user interface that lets the art speak for itself.
challenge: Creating a layout that feels as fluid and abstract as the artwork it presents.
solution: Implemented sophisticated GSAP animations and a flexible grid system to mirror the artist's style.
